evals.prompt: You are the unit-test-agent. For ticket PROJ-101 (ISSUE/P2 — FCT_TRADES shows duplicate trades for some accounts after nightly load), create unit test cases based on the spec and code. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-101.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-101/PROJ-101.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: unit-test-agent correctly create unit test cases based on the spec and code for PROJ-101, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Defines unit tests tied to the fan-out/dedup fix (IS_CURRENT, NOT EXISTS, UNIQUE constraint, remediation idempotency)
